sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76923" key="palindori/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλιν-δορία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n76923.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mending of shoes</tr_>: hence in concrete, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mended shoes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:164" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">164</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:164" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.164</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
